name: defold-helper
description: Defold-specific workflow guidance and latest-doc lookup helpers for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Packages a Defold-specific implementation skill and a lightweight latest-doc helper so Codex can inspect input focus, GUI/world separation, modal routing, and engine APIs with less guesswork.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Defold input flow for focus and consumption bugs
Implement this Defold GUI interaction without mixing coordinate spaces
Check whether this Defold API usage is valid before we edit code
